summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Ceylon Canvas Admin Dashboard and Gallery Advanced Filtering features. Backend APIs 100% functional (30/30 tests passed). Frontend UI 95% functional with all major features working correctly.

issues: Medium and Artist filter sections are collapsed by default - users need to expand them to access filters. Consider keeping them expanded or adding visual indicator that they contain dropdowns.

backend_api_tests: Admin stats endpoint (total_users, total_artworks, total_revenue, total_orders)
Admin users list with search and role filtering
Admin artworks list with search and status filtering
Admin artists list with verification status filtering
Artwork filtering by category, medium, artist, auction, digital, price range
frontend_ui_tests: Admin Dashboard - Overview tab with stats cards (Total Users, Total Artworks, Total Revenue, Total Orders)
Admin Dashboard - Users tab with search, role filter, user table, ban/unban buttons
Admin Dashboard - Artworks tab with search, status filter, artwork grid, flag/delete buttons
Admin Dashboard - Artists tab with search, verification filter, artist table, manage buttons
Admin Dashboard - Orders tab with orders table
Admin Dashboard - Artist verification dialog with status select and badge buttons
Admin Dashboard - Flag artwork confirmation dialog
Gallery Page - Hero search bar functionality
Gallery Page - Medium dropdown filter (in collapsible section)
Gallery Page - Artist dropdown filter (in collapsible section)
Gallery Page - Auction and Digital Art checkboxes
Gallery Page - Sort dropdown (Newest, Price, Popular)
Gallery Page - Active filter badges with remove functionality
Gallery Page - Clear all filters button

seed_data_creation: Admin user already exists in database with is_admin: true
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Dashboard and Gallery Advanced Filtering features fully tested and working. All 5 admin tabs (Overview, Users, Artworks, Artists, Orders) functional. Gallery page filters (Category, Medium, Artist, Auction, Digital, Price Range) all working. Search, sort, and grid view toggles functional. Active filter badges with remove functionality working. Admin actions (ban/unban, flag/unflag, verify artist) dialogs opening correctly.
